holdings.infoBox: RPHS is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are E-mini S&P 500 Future June 26 stock at 41.43%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 30.57%, Future on US Dollar Index at 23.24%, Southern Co. 3.75% at 1.23%, and Air Canada 3.875% at 1.06%.

overview.description: The Regents Park Hedged Market Strategy ETF (RPHS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that seeks to provide capital appreciation by investing in the US large-cap equity space combined with hedging market risk. RPHS was launched on Mar 31, 2022 and is issued by Regents Park.
